name: RPlog_Deal_with_the_Falleen
title: A Deal with the Falleen
summary: In the exotic Goetia Garden of Rive Ga'uche on Nar Shaddaa, the Jedi Jessalyn seeks out the Falleen crime lord Nasiri to ask for sanctuary. Pursued by Malign's fleet and now the Caspian Union after events on Bespin and Caspar, with even New Republic space closed to her, Jessalyn explains that her family is in danger and needs a place to hide. Nasiri, intrigued that a Jedi would come to him for refuge rather than violence, offers her a fortified dwelling on the Basin with no questions asked, a guard force under her limited command, and his protection. His only price is a single unspecified favor to be called in later, which Jessalyn cautiously accepts with the caveat that it must stay within her Jedi conscience. The two settle the arrangements amiably, Nasiri waxing philosophical about the dangerous elegance of his rebuilt city, and Jessalyn departs with relief, gratitude, and an invitation to dine at his table once she and her family are settled.
